reasoning: Purdue opened the 2025-2026 season as a favorite to win the NCAA tournament but struggled later in the regular season. Recent late-season projections heading into Selection Sunday (March 2026) have them as a No. 3 seed. In early March 2026, sportsbooks listed Purdue at 40-1 odds to win the National Championship, which carries an implied true probability of around 2% to 2.4% (stripping the vigorish). While they picked up two wins in the 2026 Big Ten Tournament to reach the final, they opened as a 5.5-point underdog in that match, indicating they are a strong but not strictly elite team right now compared to the top contenders. The Polymarket price on March 6 was 0.03. I anchor my prediction tightly to the available sportsbook odds (40-1) augmented slightly by their late Big Ten Tournament run, resulting in an estimate of just over 3%.
